info.title: Replication
info.description: SAP Responsible Design and Production provides a public API for data replication. The API allows to replicate data from your system(s) into SAP Responsible Design and Production.

x-sap-shortText: Enables you to replicate data from external systems into SAP Responsible Design and Production.

put.description: Replicate divisions that should be used as organization data. To find out, which SAP S/4HANA attributes match these API members, see [user guide](https://help.sap.com/viewer/01d581e7150c42f59b5234a76f5e8d2d/latest/en-US/64db67d600b549d2b3bd81c3689c8d95.html)

parameters.name: Content-Encoding
parameters.description: Indicates to the server that the request body has been compressed using the gzip algorithm. It is recommended to compress the payload whenever possible. To be able to use this option, the payload must be compressed using gzip before sending.

401.description: Unauthorized. No valid access token was provided or it expired.

403.description: Forbidden. The provided access token does not contain the necessary scope.

415.description: Unsupported media type: {unsupportedType}. Expected media type: {supportedType}

default.description: This information should be available in every response.

sus-api-version.description: Specifies the version of the SUS API being used.

target.description: Reference to the location of the error.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

siUnitCnvrsnRateNumerator.description: Numerator of conversion rate from SI unit to unit of measure

siUnitCnvrsnRateDenominator.description: Denominator of conversion rate from SI unit to unit of measure

siUnitCnvrsnRateExponent.description: Exponent of conversion rate from SI unit to unit of measure

siUnitCnvrsnAdditiveValue.description: Additive value of conversion from SI unit to unit of measure

technicalName.description: External Unit of Measurement in Technical Format (6-Char.)

commercialName.description: Commercial name for a Unit of Measurement.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

texts.description: Unit of Measure ISO Code Text (Maximum 25 Characters).

name.description: Unit of measure iso code name

UnitOfMeasureISOCodeText.description: Unit of Measure ISO Code Text (Maximum 25 Characters).

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.
Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

id.description: ID of the supplier in the source system.

taxNumbers.description: List of tax numbers for this supplier.

taxNumberType.description: Defines the country/region and the category of numbers to which the tax number belongs. For example, 'GB3' means this business partners' tax number is a company registration number in the United Kingdom.

taxNumber.description: The tax number of the supplier.

SupplierTaxNumber.description: List of tax numbers for this supplier.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

fiscalYear.description: A period (usually 12 months) for which a company is required to provide its physical inventory count and balance sheet. The fiscal year may correspond exactly to the calendar year, but this is not obligatory. The relationship between the calendar year and the fiscal year is defined through the fiscal year variant.

supplierInvoiceItem.description: Number of line item within accounting document

supplierInvoiceIDByInvgParty.description: Reference document number. The reference document number can contain the document number of the customer/vendor. However, it may contain a different value. The reference document number is used as a search criterion when displaying or changing documents. In correspondence, the reference document number is sometimes printed in place of the document number.

purchaseOrderItem.description: Item number of purchasing document. The number that uniquely identifies an item in a purchasing document.

reverseDocument.description: If this invoice cancels another invoice, this ID identifies the cancelled invoice. If this invoice is the cancelled one, this ID identifies the cancellation.

reverseDocumentFiscalYear.description: If this invoice cancels another invoice, this field identifies the year of the cancelled invoice.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

currency.description: Sales Organization Currency (used e.g. for statistics).

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

type.description: Assigns the product to a group of products such as finished goods, trading goods and packaging materials.

isMarkedForDeletion.description: Indicates that the product was deleted in the source system. The product data is still relevant for EPR reporting and must not be deleted in SAP Responsible Design and Production.

baseUnitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure in which stocks of the product are managed.

division.description: The division the product belongs to.

productGroup.description: Assigns the product to a group of products.

productHierarchy.description: Assigns the product to a product hierarchy.

productUnitOfMeasures.description: List of Product Unit Of Measure

globalTradeItemNumbers.description: List of Global Trade Item Numbers

mfrPartNumber.description: Manufacturer part number of the product.

salesMeasureUnit.description: Unit of measure in which the product is sold. If not maintained, the base unit of measure is used.

measurementUnit.description: Unit of measure in which stocks of the product are managed.

netWeight.description: Net weight of the product. Represents the weight of the product itself, excluding the packaging. The unit of weight is specified in the weightMeasurementUnit field.

grossWeight.description: Gross weight of the product. Represents the total weight of the product, including both the product and its packaging. The unit of weight is specified in the weightMeasurementUnit field.

weightMeasurementUnit.description: Unit of measure for the weight.

unitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure to which this GTIN applies.

isMain.description: Indicates whether the GTIN is the main GTIN for the product.

globalTradeItemNumber.description: Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) of the product.

measurementUnit.description: Unit of measure in which quantities can be entered alternatively to the base unit of measure. Must also contain the 'Base Unit Of Measure' with numerator and 'denominator' set to 1.

ProductUnitOfMeasure.description: List of Product Unit Of Measure

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

id.description: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the product the product extension belongs to.

productTypeHarmonized.description: The harmonized product type. For possible values, see [user guide](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_RESPONSIBLE_DESIGN_AND_PRODUCTION/01d581e7150c42f59b5234a76f5e8d2d/a27e70d5d57e4cd8b0d11feda8658702.html)

productContent.description: The product content. For possible values, see [user guide](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_RESPONSIBLE_DESIGN_AND_PRODUCTION/01d581e7150c42f59b5234a76f5e8d2d/b124ade2a64f477e94db2947192326bc.html)

isHazardousClpEu.description: Indicates whether the product is hazardous according to the CLP regulation.

hasNoPackaging.description: Indicates whether the product is delivered without packaging. 'True' means without packaging.

brand.description: ID of the brand. Brands can be created in the Configuration Cockpit.

referenceQuantity.description: The reference quantity is used during fee calculation in order to provide enough decimals for an accurate calculation.

ProductExtension.description: The product extension. For details, see [user guide](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_RESPONSIBLE_DESIGN_AND_PRODUCTION/01d581e7150c42f59b5234a76f5e8d2d/5a287871c4724a459356c6f43de9c1b2.html)

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.
Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

authorizationGroup.description: Deprecated. Identifier of a authorization group

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

country.description: ID of the country/region. Can be one of the IDs replicated with the country data. Not the ISO code.

validFrom.description: The data record is valid after this date. The system considers the latest applicable valid record.

tag.description: Producer-specific attribute that can be used to filter data (inclusive / exclusive) in the report configuration.

isNotEprRelevant.description: Product will be excluded in general by the local PRO via report category.

eprProductFamily.description: The EPR product family. For details, see [user guide](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_RESPONSIBLE_DESIGN_AND_PRODUCTION/01d581e7150c42f59b5234a76f5e8d2d/f9c5d119174c4c6a9428d8df0c3ea631.html)

inhouseProductionPercent.description: It can be applied to any packaging that is used as 'Packaging as Product' or that is used to package a finished good. A prerequisite is that the packaging element has a product assigned. See [Packaging as Product](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_RESPONSIBLE_DESIGN_AND_PRODUCTION/c6de4213f12b4fc990a09cfa1028719c/69840296426843f18a6fb18476dd7afa.html).

hasDeposit.description: The product has packaging elements with deposit and is subject to deposit regulation in the related country/region.

ProductCountry.description: This entity contains optional, country specific data.

companyCode.description: The company code of the plant.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.
Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

LocalTime.description: The date on which the material document was created

postingDate.description: The date of posting the goods movement into the SAP ERP system

creationDate.description: The date on which the material document was created

issuingOrReceivingPlant.description: Unique identifier of the issuing ot receiving Plant

stockMaterial.description: Material in Respect of Which Stock is Managed

inventoryStockType.description: An indicator denoting a type of special stock of material

baseUnitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure in which stocks of the product are managed.

quantityInBaseUnit.description: Quantity calculated in the base unit  of measure in which stocks of the product are managed.

materialStockChangeQtyInBaseUnit.description: Stock Quantity in Base Unit of Measure.

quantityInEntryUnit.description: Quantity in the entered Unit of Measure

inventoryManagementReferenceDocument.description: Filled in during reversal movement representing the id of the original Material Document.

referenceDocument.description: Reference document number of the customer/vendor

purchaseOrder.description: Unique number of a Purchase Order.

purchaseOrderItem.description: The number that uniquely identifies the item in a purchase order.

productionOrder.description: Unique number of a Manufacturing Order (Production Order).

delivery.description: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the Delivery in the source system.

deliveryDocumentItem.description: The number that uniquely identifies the item in a delivery.

isCanceled.description: Flag that indicates whether a Goods Movement Is Cancelled or not.

isReversalMovementType.description: Flag that indicates that the movement type is a reversal movement type.

goodsMovementType.description: A coded representation of the type of a goods movement such as a goods receipt, goods issue, or a stock transfer.

product.description: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the product.

issuingOrReceivingProduct.description: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the issuing or receiving Product

batch.description: Key uniquely identifying the Batch in the source system.

manufactureDate.description: Date when the Batch was manufactured

issuingOrReceivingBatch.description: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the issuing or receiving batch

supplier.description: Key uniquely identifying the Supplier in the source system.

customer.description: Key uniquely identifying the Customer in the source system.

goodsRecipientName.description: The name of a goods recipient or ship-to party.

referenceDocumentType.description: A coded representation of the reference document type

accountingDocumentType.description: The document type classifies the accounting documents.

stockChangeCategory.description: Specifies the category of the stock change.

isCrossPlantTransfer.description: Specifies whether the goods movement was a cross plant transfer.

logisticProcess.description: RDP specific attribute based on which the logistic process can be determined.

incoterms.description: Incoterms are internationally accepted rules of the International Chamber of Commerce

shipToCountry.description: Country/Region to which this material document was shipped.

shipFromCountry.description: Country/Region from which this material document was shipped.

shipToRegion.description: State/Province to which this material document was shipped.

goodsSupplier.description: Key uniquely identifying the Goods Supplier in the source system.

issuingOrReceivingPlantCountry.description: Deprecated. Country of Issuing or Receiving Plant

supplierCountry.description: Deprecated. The country in which a supplier is located.

customerCountry.description: Deprecated. Key of the country in which a customer is located

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

product.description: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the product.

stockQuantityInBaseUnit.description: Quantity calculated in the base unit  of measure in which stocks of the product are managed.

baseUnitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure in which stocks of the product are managed.

language.description: The language associated with the Incoterm.

type.description: Type of the delivery, for example, LF, LO, LR.

salesOrganization.description: Identifier of the sales organization this delivery belongs to.

shipToParty.description: Identifier of the business partner this delivery was shipped to.

soldToParty.description: Identifier of the business partner this delivery was sold to.

shipToCountry.description: Country/Region to which this delivery was shipped.

shipToRegion.description: State/Province to which this delivery was shipped.

actualGoodsMovementDate.description: Actual date of the delivery. Date when the delivery was moved out.

incoterms.description: Internationally accepted rules of the International Chamber of Commerce

items.description: List of items that were shipped with this delivery.

overallGoodsMovementStatus.description: Status of the process of a delivery. Possible values are: A (not yet processed), B (partially processed), C (complete)

id.description: The number that uniquely identifies the item in a delivery.

category.description: Category of the delivery item, for example, 'Return'.

product.description: ID of the finished product or trading good that has been delivered.

batch.description: Batch the shipped product belongs to.

baseQuantity.description: Actual quantity delivered in base unit of measure of the product.

baseUnit.description: Base unit of measure of the product, that means, unit of measure of the base quantity.

salesQuantity.description: Quantity of the delivered item in sales units.

plant.description: Plant the delivery was sent from.

shipFromCountry.description: Country/Region from which this delivery was shipped.

distributionChannel.description: The way in which products or services reach the customer.

division.description: Line of business of the company the delivery item belongs to. This is required in some reports, for example, in the Canadian report.

referenceSDDocument.description: Document number of reference document. Identifies the sales order to which the delivery refers.

referenceSDDocumentItem.description: Item number of the reference item. The number of the sales order item to which the delivery item refers.

referenceSDDocumentCategory.description: Activity or element category. Key identifying the activity type or the category of the activity element, for example, an internal activity or work element.

DeliveryItem.description: List of items that were shipped with this delivery.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

id.description: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the customer in the source system.

phone.description: Phone number of the business partner.

fax.description: Fax number of the business partner.

houseNumber.description: House number of the business partner.

postalCode.description: Postal code of the business partner.

category.description: Category of the business partner. Possible values are: 1 (Person), 2 (Organization), 3 (Group)

taxNumbers.description: List of tax numbers for this customer.

taxNumberType.description: Defines the country/region and the category of numbers to which the tax number belongs. For example, 'GB3' means this business partners' tax number is a company registration number in the United Kingdom.

taxNumber.description: The tax number of the customer.

CustomerTaxNumber.description: List of tax numbers for this customer.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

id.description: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the customer the customer extension belongs to.

tag.description: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the producer specific customer tag.

role.description: Code uniquely identifying the customer role.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

isPrimaryISOCurrency.description: Flag identifying if the ID is the primary ID. Identifying a primary ID is necessary in case there are duplicate ISO codes for different IDs, that means, the ISO code assigned to the current currency code is not unique.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

isEuropeanUnionMember.description: Indicates if a country/region is a member of the European Union.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

level.description: Number of the level in the product hierarchy

type.description: Identifier of the product brand code list

salesOrganization.description: Unique identifier of the Sales Organization

distributionChannel.description: Unique identifier of the Distribution Channel

billingDocument.description: Sales and distribution document number. The number that uniquely identifies the sales, delivery, or billing document.

billingDocumentItem.description: Item number of the sales and distribution document.

billingDocumentDate.description: Billing date in format YYYY-MM-DD. The date on which the billing is processed and booked for accounting purposes.

referenceSDDocument.description: Document number of reference document. Identifies the sales order to which the delivery refers.

referenceSDDocumentItem.description: Item number of the reference item. The number of the sales order item to which the delivery item refers.

referenceSDDocumentCategory.description: Activity or element category. Key identifying the activity type or the category of the activity element, for example, an internal activity or work element.

cancelledBillingDocument.description: The ID in this field is a billing document that is cancelled. Documents and their cancellation documents are excluded from report calculations.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

id.description: Batch the shipped product belongs to.

product.description: ID of the finished product or trading good that has been delivered.

plant.description: Plant the delivery was sent from.

productionPlant.description: Plant where the Batch was manufactured.

manufactureDate.description: The date when the product was manufactured.

source.description: Source System identifier. A constant value shall be provided per source system that replicates data.

productId.description: Product ID of a product that uses this packaging composition.

businessProcessDirection.description: Relevance for business processes (INBOUND, OUTBOUND or ALL)

supplierId.description: Key uniquely identifying the Supplier in the source system.

from.description: When the packaging composition starts to be used for the product.

to.description: When the packaging composition stops to be used for the product.

scopes.smrdp!b3480.data-replicate: Permission to replicate data from an external system
